# kIOHIDElementKey

**Macro**

Keys that represents an element property.

## Declaration

```swift
#define kIOHIDElementKey
```

## Discussion

Property for a HID Device or element dictionary. Elements can be heirarchical, so they can contain other elements.
title: kIOHIDElementKey
